source.name: Netlify Documentation
source.sections: 9 (development, frameworks, build, data-storage, forms, domains, team, billing, general)
source.update-frequency: Regular — Netlify ships platform updates frequently
source.plugin-note: Author tobinsouth is an Anthropic contributor. Plugin has 12 skills covering functions, edge functions, blobs, database, image CDN, forms, config, CLI, frameworks, caching, AI gateway, and deployment.

rate-limits.known-limits: No robots.txt found (returns HTML 200). llms.txt present = crawl-friendly.
rate-limits.decision: Small site (78 pages). Full crawl takes ~3 min at polite rate. No reason to be aggressive. Polite is fine.

checklist.step: Research existing tools — found netlify-skills plugin, installed
Fetch and inspect llms.txt — 78 pages, 9 sections
Check robots.txt — none found, llms.txt present
Review rate limit docs — no published limits

known-issues.issue: No robots.txt — returns HTML instead. Astro/Starlight-based docs. Content is in "main" tag. Pagefind search index also available.

decisions.decision: Installed netlify-skills plugin first (checklist step 1). The plugin provides 12 skills for Netlify platform features. The crawler complements this by tracking doc changes over time for SDK primitive updates.
